items.caption: A collection of four logo designs for a law firm named "thompson law firm." each logo features a shield emblem with a star and a letter "t" inside, set against a different colored background. the colors include red, orange, black, and white. the text "thompson law firm" is written in a serif font, with the word "thompson" in a larger font size than "law firm." the logos are presented on a white background, and the overall style of the image is clean and professional, likely intended for use in corporate branding materials.
